sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20967" key="bri/gkos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρίγκος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a <sense id="n20967.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sea-fish</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0450.tlg001:12:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ephipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0476.tlg001:4:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mnesim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
